phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find authentic Moroccan pastries nearby
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je trouver de véritables pâtisseries marocaines dans ce quartier ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zhuh troo-VAY duh vay-ree-TABL pah-tee-suh-REE mah-roh-KEN dahn suh kar-TYAY
phrases.cultural_note: Saint-Michel is Bordeaux's most diverse and lively neighbourhood, with a strong North African community and vibrant street food scene.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the Sunday market starts
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure commence le marché du dimanche ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel ur koh-MAHNS luh mar-SHAY doo dee-MAHNSH ee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: The Sunday market around the Basilique Saint-Michel is one of the most colourful in Bordeaux, with produce, antiques, and ethnic foods.

responses.english: Hello, the Saint-Michel market starts at eight o'clock.
responses.phonetic: bawn-ZHOOR ah KEL UR koh-MAHNS luh MAR-shuh dyoo dee-MAHNSH
responses.local: Bonjour, le marché de Saint-Michel commence à huit heures.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a table for lunch at a neighbourhood bistro
phrases.text_local: Avez-vous une table libre pour le déjeuner ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah-VAY-voo yoon TAB-luh LEE-bruh poor luh day-zhuh-NAY
phrases.cultural_note: Saint-Michel has affordable neighbourhood bistros and ethnic restaurants offering excellent value compared to the tourist centre.

responses.english: Yes, follow me, I will seat you.
responses.phonetic: bawn-ZHOOR AH-vay voo een TAH-bl poor luh day-zhuh-NAY
responses.local: Oui, suivez-moi, je vais vous installer.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the area is safe to walk around at night
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que ce quartier est sûr pour se promener le soir ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh suh kar-TYAY eh SYR poor suh proh-muh-NAY luh SWAHR
phrases.cultural_note: Saint-Michel is generally lively at night; like any urban area, it pays to stay aware of your surroundings on quieter streets.

phrases.intent_en: Ask a vendor if they sell Bordeaux-style canelés
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que vous vendez des canelés bordelais traditionnels ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh voo vahn-DAY day kah-nuh-LAY bor-duh-LAY trah-dee-syoh-NEL
phrases.cultural_note: You can find excellent artisan canelés in the boulangeries of Saint-Michel, often at lower prices than tourist-area shops.

responses.english: Yes, they are fresh out of the oven.
responses.phonetic: bawn-ZHOOR, vahn-DAY voo duh kahn-lay bor-duh-LAY
responses.local: Oui, ils sont frais sortis du four.
